findings.title: IOCTL 0x80002040
findings.detail: <UNKNOWN> / METHOD_BUFFERED / FILE_ANY_ACCESS [decompiler] | sinks (dispatcher-wide): PsLookupProcessByProcessId, ZwOpenProcess, ZwTerminateProcess, memmove

findings.title: IoCreateDevice: world-accessible by default
findings.detail: IoCreateDevice assigns no security descriptor; accessible to all users. Consider IoCreateDeviceSecure with a restrictive SDDL.

findings.title: IoCreateSymbolicLink: \Device\ZemanaAntiMalware
findings.detail: Symbolic link exposes device to Win32 namespace; verify DACL on the target device object.
